title: Retrospective Follow-Ups Closeout
summary: Classify #347-#351 after the retrospective follow-up implementation slice landed and was archived.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Distinguish legacy archive-distillation debt from new regressions in operational-compression reporting
issue_classifications.evidence: Operational-compression report now exposes legacy_missing_distillation_count and post_contract_missing_distillation_count; live repo shows 178 legacy and 0 post-contract misses.

issue_classifications.title: [Bug]: Generated llms.txt adapter repeats startup and success guidance
issue_classifications.evidence: The generated llms.txt template was de-duplicated and the checked-in adapter was refreshed through make maintainer-surfaces.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Make broad-work closeout show package dogfooding evidence
issue_classifications.evidence: Workspace report closeout_trust now includes package_workflow_evidence derived from active planning proof expectations and execution-run evidence.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Add branch-continuity guardrails for workflow-changing git actions
issue_classifications.evidence: Branch workflow posture now includes a branch_mutation_policy for branch switching, cross-branch merging, rebasing, and pushing a different branch.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Resolve or baseline remaining historical closeout-audit debt
issue_classifications.evidence: Planning closeout reconciliation now supports accepted_historical_baseline and this repo carries 000-historical-closeout-baseline-2026-04-26.review.json.
